q1_sink_dangerous.evidence: Sink is _os.system(...) which executes a shell command, a form of shell execution explicitly listed as dangerous.

mock_guidance.target: Mock _os.system to prevent actual shell execution during the test.
mock_guidance.capture: Capture the exact command string argument passed to _os.system, specifically the value of "ping -c 1 " + host, so the test can assert that unsanitized user input reached the sink.
mock_guidance.fake_behavior: Return 0 to simulate a successful command execution without performing any real OS-level side effects.
notes: The _os module alias must be resolved correctly in the mock setup; patch the system call where it is referenced in the target module.
Ensure the mock does not suppress exceptions if the test intends to verify the call was reached.
